code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test21-FEB-2019Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting possible renal impairment, and high chloride. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubin, ketones, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, indicating possible renal dysfunction and/or tubular damage. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying metabolic or renal disorders.
